mapper.select: SELECT r.menu_id AS menuId , COALESCE(r.can_view, false) AS canView , COALESCE(r.can_create, false) AS canCreate , COALESCE(r.can_update, false) AS canUpdate , COALESCE(r.can_delete, false) AS canDelete , COALESCE(r.can_excel_download, false) AS canExcelDownload , COALESCE(r.can_approve, false) AS canApprove FROM om_auth_group_menu_r r WHERE r.auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd} AND r.system_main_cd = #{systemMainCd} AND r.system_sub_cd = #{systemSubCd} AND COALESCE(r.is_deleted, false) = false ORDER BY r.menu_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( CASE WHEN v.menu_id = 'basic-users' THEN 'user' ELSE REPLACE(v.menu_id, '-', '_') END, ':', v.action ) AS permission_code FROM om_auth_group_menu_permission_v v WHERE v.auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd} AND v.system_main_cd = #{systemMainCd} AND v.system_sub_cd = #{systemSubCd} AND v.allowed = true ORDER BY permission_code ASC

SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( CASE WHEN v.menu_id = 'basic-users' THEN 'user' ELSE REPLACE(v.menu_id, '-', '_') END, ':', v.action ) AS permission_code FROM om_auth_group_menu_permission_v v WHERE v.auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd} AND v.system_main_cd = #{systemMainCd} AND v.allowed = true ORDER BY permission_code ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO om_auth_group_menu_r ( auth_group_cd, menu_id, system_main_cd, system_sub_cd, can_view, can_create, can_update, can_delete, can_excel_download, can_approve, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{authGroupCd}, #{item.menuId}, #{systemMainCd}, #{systemSubCd}, #{item.canView}, #{item.canCreate}, #{item.canUpdate}, #{item.canDelete}, #{item.canExcelDownload}, #{item.canApprove}, #{userId}, #{userId}, false )
ON CONFLICT (auth_group_cd, menu_id) DO UPDATE SET system_main_cd = EXCLUDED.system_main_cd , system_sub_cd = EXCLUDED.system_sub_cd , can_view = EXCLUDED.can_view , can_create = EXCLUDED.can_create , can_update = EXCLUDED.can_update , can_delete = EXCLUDED.can_delete , can_excel_download = EXCLUDED.can_excel_download , can_approve = EXCLUDED.can_approve , is_deleted = false , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by
